prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年吉林大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约20356名→20783名→24346名→25300名→28704名，连续5年持续后移，累计后移约8348名，近3年加速后 移趋势明显，2025年基准位次约28704名；2021–2025年该校在山东省综合类招生计划分别为564人→550人→559人→548人→538人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势；2026年（§ 7文件）综合类计划486人，较2025年减少52人，缩招幅度约9.7%，为近年最大降幅，缩招将推高录取门槛（位次数字减小）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 吉林大学为教育部直属985工程、2 11工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第26名，近年稳定在24–27名区间，属全国顶尖综合性大学，对山东考生有持续吸引力；2026年高考周期内 声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（前卫校区浴池偷窃事件等13条负面记录）及学术不端相关舆情，可能降低部分考生报考意愿；抖音热度从2022年高热第8名降至近 年未进入前65名，关注度降温；第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科共15个，其中考古学A+、马克思主义理论A+、法学A、数学A、化学A、机械工程A、物理学A、兽医 学A等，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年山东省高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年68.1万人增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生规模扩大 加剧竞争；吉林大学位于吉林省长春市，距山东省较远，属跨省报考；该校在 山东省招生规模较大（近年500人以上），为吉林大学在外省主要生源地之一，但2026年计划大幅缩减至486人，跨省报考的地域偏好影响相对有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年 招生计划大幅缩招（-52人，-9.7%）的推高效应、山东省考生总数增加5.7%的竞争加剧、声誉负面及抖音热度降温的报考意愿下降，以及学校985/211层次和15个A-以上优势学科 的稳固吸引力，预测2026年最低录取位次约27240名，区间26740–27740名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Jilin University in Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 20356 → 20783 → 24346 → 25300 → 28704, continuously moving backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 8348 places, and an accelerating backward trend in the last 3 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 28704. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for this university in Shandong Province comprehensive category were 564 → 550 → 559 → 548 → 538, showing a slight year-on-year reduction trend. In 2026 (Document §7), the comprehensive plan is 486, a decrease of 52 from 2025, a reduction of about 9.7%, the largest decline in recent years, which will raise the admission threshold (ranking number decreases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a directly affiliated 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university under the Ministry of Education. It ranks 26th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 24–27 range in recent years, belonging to the top comprehensive universities nationwide, with sustained appeal to Shandong candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (13 negative records such as theft in the Qianwei campus bathhouse) and academic misconduct-related public opinion, which may reduce some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity dropped from a high of 8th in 2022 to not entering the top 65 in recent years, indicating cooling attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 15 disciplines rated A- or above, including Archaeology A+, Marxist Theory A+, Law A, Mathematics A, Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Physics A, Veterinary Medicine A, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of candidates registered for the Shandong Province college entrance examination is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) from 681,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, relatively far from Shandong Province, making it a cross-province application. The university has a large enrollment scale in Shandong Province (over 500 in recent years), making it one of the main sources of students outside the province for Jilin University. However, the 2026 plan is significantly reduced to 486, and the impact of regional preference for cross-province applications is relatively limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the boosting effect of the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-52, -9.7%), the intensified competition from a 5.7% increase in Shandong candidates, the decline in willingness to apply due to negative reputation and cooling Douyin popularity, and the stable appeal of the university's 985/211 level and 15 A- or above advantageous disciplines, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 27240, with a range of 26740–27740.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking of 27240 is within the range of 26740–27740. Candidates with rankings within 26000 are advised to focus on sprinting for Tier 1, such as the flagship Law major. Candidates with rankings between 27000–28000 should target Tier 2 advantageous disciplines like Computer Science, Mathematics, and Vehicle Engineering as the main direction, while also considering the edge of Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings above 28000 may consider Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also paying attention to the intensified competition risk brought by the 2026 enrollment reduction.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年吉林大学在山东省医学类最低录取位次分别为：2021年29711位（计划60人）、2022年29498位（计划64人）、2023年24985位（计划67人）、2024年29931位（计划69 人）、2025年30395位（计划67人）。五年间位次波动显著，2023年因医学报考热度高涨，位次大幅上升至24985位，随后2024-2025年连续回落至30000位左右，呈现降温趋势。20 26年医学类招生计划大幅缩减至48人，较2025年减少19人，缩招幅度约28.4%，根据供需弹性原理，缩招将显著推高录取门槛，使位次数字明显减小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 吉林大学是教育部直属全国重点综合性大学，位列国家'985工程''211工程'和'双一流'建设高校，综合实力位居全国前列。其白求恩医学部历史悠久、声誉卓著，临床医学、口 腔医学等专业在全国具有较高知名度和认可度，对山东考生具有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是高考报考的热门方向，临床医学（5+3一体化）、口腔医学等专业竞争尤为激烈。吉林大学地处长春，虽非一线城市，但其医学品牌效应强劲，对追求高性价比 医学教育的山东考生仍具较强吸引力。2026年医学类大幅缩招将进一步加剧竞争态势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，预测2026年吉林大学在山东省医学类最低录取位次约为25422位，波动区间为24922-25922位。受招生计划大幅缩减影响，2026年录取门槛 将显著高于2025年，位次预计上升约5000位，报考难度明显增加，建议考生合理评估自身位次与竞争形势。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Jilin University's medical programs in Shandong Province were: 29,711 in 2021 (planned enrollment 60), 29,498 in 2022 (planned enrollment 64), 24,985 in 2023 (planned enrollment 67), 29,931 in 2024 (planned enrollment 69), and 30,395 in 2025 (planned enrollment 67). Rankings fluctuated significantly over the five years. In 2023, due to high enthusiasm for medical studies, the ranking rose sharply to 24,985, then fell back to around 30,000 in 2024-2025, showing a cooling trend. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan is sharply reduced to 48, a decrease of 19 from 2025, a reduction of about 28.4%. According to the supply-demand elasticity principle, the reduction will significantly raise the admission threshold, causing the ranking number to decrease markedly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a national key comprehensive university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the national '985 Project', '211 Project', and 'Double First-Class' construction universities, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its Norman Bethune Health Science Center has a long history and outstanding reputation, with clinical medicine, stomatology, and other majors enjoying high visibility and recognition nationwide, exerting sustained appeal to Shandong candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction for college entrance exams, with fierce competition in programs like Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) and Stomatology. Although Jilin University is located in Changchun, not a first-tier city, its strong medical brand effect still attracts Shandong candidates seeking high cost-effectiveness in medical education. The significant reduction in medical enrollment in 2026 will further intensify competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Jilin University's medical programs in Shandong Province in 2026 is approximately 25,422, with a fluctuation range of 24,922 to 25,922. Due to the sharp reduction in enrollment plan, the admission threshold in 2026 will be significantly higher than in 2025, with the ranking expected to rise by about 5,000 places, making application difficulty increase markedly. Candidates are advised to reasonably assess their own rankings and competitive situation.
